offers.title: Offers
offers.subtitle: What the estate is offering buyers right now. Reserve lots on their own merit, commodity lots against the C.

card.auctionSub: no fixed ask — best bid wins

empty.title: No offers published yet
empty.description: Publish a green lot and it lands here. Reserve coffees get offered on their own merit, commodity lots against the day's C plus a differential.

publish.title: Publish a green offer
publish.regimeNote: The regime follows the lot's grade — a single-origin Reserve coffee can never be offered on the commodity index.
publish.askingHint: Leave blank for an auction or RFQ — no fixed ask.
publish.kgHint: Leave blank to offer everything available.
publish.noLots: Grade a lot to green first — then it can be offered.

errors.lotRequired: Pick a green lot to offer.
errors.askingPositive: The asking price must be greater than zero.
errors.kgPositive: The kilograms offered must be greater than zero.
errors.generic: Could not publish that offer. Check the details and try again.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: Standards-based sales contracts, from draft to closed. Every line claims green inventory, so the crown-jewel can never be double-sold.

empty.title: No contracts yet
empty.description: Create a contract for a buyer, add the lots they're taking, and sign it. Each line reserves green inventory the moment you add it.

create.title: New sales contract
create.noBuyers: Add a buyer first, then create a contract.

errors.buyerRequired: Pick a buyer for this contract.
errors.generic: Could not create that contract. Check the details and try again.
errors.buyerGeneric: Could not save that buyer. Check the details and try again.

lines.title: Contract lines
lines.empty: No lines yet. Add the lots this buyer is taking.

add.title: Add a line
add.reserveExcluded: Reserve lots can't sit on a differential contract.
add.kgHint: Reserves this volume the moment you add it.

sign.title: Sign this contract?
sign.body: Signing locks the {count} line(s) on {contract} for {buyer}. You can't add or change lines after this.
sign.needsLine: Add at least one line before signing.
sign.reservePrereq: A Reserve contract needs an approved pre-shipment sample before it can be signed.
sign.irreversible: This is a legal instrument. Signing is final.

errors.kgPositive: The kilograms must be greater than zero.
errors.pricePositive: The unit price must be zero or more.
errors.generic: Could not add that line. Check the details and try again.
errors.signGeneric: Could not sign the contract. Try again.

fixation.title: Fixation
fixation.subtitle: Differential lines waiting on a C lock. Pick the moment, fix the price. Reserve lots are off the C and never appear here.

summary.kgSub: kg priced on a floating C
summary.readySub: lines with a live C mark

card.noMark: No C mark for this month yet

fix.title: Fix this line's price?
fix.body: Locks {kg} kg of {lot} at the current C plus the differential — {price}/kg.
fix.bodyUnknown: Locks {kg} kg of {lot} at the current C plus the differential.
fix.irreversible: Irreversible — this locks the C leg at today's mark. There's no un-fix.

empty.title: Nothing to fix right now
empty.description: Differential contract lines show up here while their C leg floats. Add a differential line on a contract and it appears, ready to lock.

errors.generic: Could not fix that line. Try again.
